description: Style Note Crafted from genuine leather and designed with loads of organiser space, this wallet from hidekraft makes for a perfect addition to your handbag.Product Details Black wallet for women, press button fastening, eighteen card holders, two slip pockets, two main compartments, two zipper pouches and two mesh compartmentsWarranty: 180 daysMaterial and Care Leather Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlightSize 20 cm x 9 cmWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
